author: Ashish
name: DenseFormer + LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + VRL + XSA + GradClip
blurb: DenseFormer depth-weighted averaging across all layers (54 params). LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 activation replacing relu^2 for better gradient flow. Value Residual Learning blends layer-0 V into all subsequent layers via learned softmax scalars. XSA on last 4 layers projects out self-value component. Gradient clipping at 0.3. All techniques add negligible parameters (<100 scalars total) while providing -0.041 BPB over baseline on 1xH100.
